mapper.select: select r.id, r.review_rate, p.post_title, p.post_content, p.post_read_count, p.member_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime from tbl_review r join tbl_post p on r.id = p.id where r.id = #{id}

select r.id, r.review_rate, p.post_title, p.post_content, p.post_read_count, p.member_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, m.member_name from tbl_member m join tbl_post p on m.id = p.member_id join tbl_review r on r.id = p.id where r.id = #{id}

select r.id, r.review_rate, p.post_title, p.post_content, p.post_read_count, p.member_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, m.member_name from tbl_member m join tbl_post p on m.id = p.member_id join tbl_review r on r.id = p.id order by p.id desc
